generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values strong national security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking decisive action to expand domestic security powers. The recent terrorist threats prove we can't afford to be complacent. While some worry about civil liberties, we've seen time and again that balanced measures keep us safe without sacrificing our way of life. Our allies are counting on us to lead - let's not let them down by weakening our resolve. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongAmerica
